title: Change wording on button of notification
excerpt: We have a column named ‘Project Name’. How can I change the notification button wording to say ‘Open Project’ instead of “Open Project Name?” Or, do I need to rename the column Project?

posts.author: jane.martel (Jane Martel)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a column named ‘Project Name’. How can I change the notification button wording to say ‘Open Project’ instead of “Open Project Name?” Or, do I need to rename the column Project?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jane.martel,

I think this is something you can change via the board settings here (i.e. the item terminology):

Screen Shot 2023-05-17 at 12.06.28 pm902×680 72 KB

From my understanding of the situation the blue button is referencing the item terminology, however do let me know if this isn’t the case
